heading: Powers
label: 100106 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)10010636:1702., , .Nov. 20, 1981Pub. L. 97–82, § 295 Stat. 1091The words “and subject to the laws of such State or States” are omitted as unnecessary.
